content: My guess is you have an antivirus problem. Click the view button and see who issues this unsupported certificate. I am guessing it is a self signed one issued by your antivirus. That is how they hack your security to scan email.

content:
Go to TB Menu Bar > View > Headers > change to Normal.

(Most don't see the top [Menu bar](https://i.imgur.com/OTvCzJ6.png), as it's hidden by default. If you don't see it, press the ALT key. To make the menu bar always visible, press ALT + V, then T, then M.)
